steps.title: Identify the cost components
steps.content:
Antonia's $7.20 total consists of two parts:
  • Pasta: $2
  • Tomatoes: $1.30 per pound for $p$ pounds, totaling $1.30p$ dollars

steps.title: Set up the equation
steps.content:
The total amount spent equals pasta cost plus tomato cost:
$$1.30p + 2 = 7.20$$
This matches choice A — A is correct.
